errors.name: NotCEO
errors.msg: Only the CEO can call this function

errors.name: NotSolvencyTreasurer
errors.msg: Only the Solvency Treasurer can call this function

errors.name: NotLiquidationTreasurer
errors.msg: Only the Liquidation Treasurer can call this function

errors.name: NotFeeCollector
errors.msg: Only the Fee Collector can claim the fees

errors.name: NotPriceOracle
errors.msg: Only the Price Oracle can call this function

errors.name: PriceOracleKeyMisMatched
errors.msg: Price Oracle Public Key did not match

errors.name: MissingRemainingAccount
errors.msg: Expected remaining account missing

errors.name: MissingSubMarketLookUpTable
errors.msg: You must include a Look Up Table Address when a user creates their first Sub Market

errors.name: InvalidSubMarketFeeRate
errors.msg: The Sub Market fee on interest earned rate can't be greater than 100%

errors.name: InvalidSolvencyInsuranceFeeRate
errors.msg: The solvency insurance fee on interest earned rate can't be greater than 4%

errors.name: MissingLendingUserLookUpTable
errors.msg: You must include a Look Up Table Address when a user initializes their Lending User Account

errors.name: IncorrectOrderOfTabAccounts
errors.msg: You must provide the sub user's tab accounts ordered by user_tab_account_index

errors.name: OracleDataStale
errors.msg: Oracle price was stale

errors.name: OraclePriceNotFound
errors.msg: Oracle price not found

errors.name: UnexpectedLendingStatsAccount
errors.msg: Unexpected Lending Stats PDA detected

errors.name: UnexpectedTokenReserveAccount
errors.msg: Unexpected Token Reserve Account PDA detected

errors.name: UnexpectedSubMarketAccount
errors.msg: Unexpected SubMarket Account PDA detected

errors.name: UnexpectedLendingUserAccount
errors.msg: Unexpected Lending User Account PDA detected

errors.name: UnexpectedTabAccount
errors.msg: Unexpected Tab Account PDA detected

errors.name: UnexpectedMonthlyStatementAccount
errors.msg: Unexpected Monthly Statement Account PDA detected

errors.name: UnexpectedOraclePriceValidatorAccount

errors.name: UnexpectedOraclePriceDataAccount

errors.name: InvalidTokenAccount
errors.msg: Invalid Token Account

errors.name: InvalidTokenAccountMint
errors.msg: Invalid Token Account Mint

errors.name: InvalidTokenAccountOwner
errors.msg: Invalid Token Account Owner

errors.name: LendingUserAccountNameTooLong
errors.msg: Lending User Account name can't be longer than 25 characters

errors.name: GlobalLimitExceeded
errors.msg: You can't deposit more than the global limit

errors.name: InsufficientFunds
errors.msg: You can't withdraw more funds than you've deposited

errors.name: InsufficientLiquidity
errors.msg: Not enough liquidity in the Token Reserve for this withdraw or borrow

errors.name: TooManyFunds
errors.msg: You can't pay back more funds than you've borrowed

errors.name: MissingTokenReserveAccountForRefresh
errors.msg: Expected Token Reserve missing for user refresh

errors.name: StaleTokenReserveOrLendingUser
errors.msg: Token Reserve or lending user health data was stale

errors.name: GriefingRepayment
errors.msg: You must repay atleast 10% of the borrow position if the account is in an unhealthy state. This prevents 'griefing'

errors.name: LiquidationExposure
errors.msg: You can't withdraw or borrow an amount that would cause your borrow liabilities to exceed 70% of deposited collateral

errors.name: NotLiquidatable
errors.msg: You can't liquidate an account whose borrow liabilities aren't 80% or more of their deposited collateral

errors.name: OverLiquidation
errors.msg: You can't repay more than 50% of a liquidati's debt position

errors.name: NotInsolvent
errors.msg: You can't zero out an account whose borrow liabilities aren't 100% or more of their deposited collateral

errors.name: DuplicateSubMarket
errors.msg: Duplicate SubMarket Detected

errors.name: TooManyTabAccounts
errors.msg: Each Lending User Account can have no more than 5 Tab Accounts. Please make new account
